mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(duration_seconds), 0) FROM track WHERE is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM play_history WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(played_seconds), 0) FROM play_history WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT al.genre AS genre, COUNT(*) AS count FROM play_history ph JOIN track t ON t.id = ph.track_id JOIN album al ON al.id = t.album_id WHERE ph.user_id = #{userId} AND al.genre IS NOT NULL AND al.genre != '' GROUP BY al.genre ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT ar.id AS artistId, ar.name AS artistName, COUNT(*) AS playCount FROM play_history ph JOIN track t ON t.id = ph.track_id JOIN artist ar ON ar.id = t.artist_id WHERE ph.user_id = #{userId} GROUP BY ar.id, ar.name ORDER BY playCount DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(played_at, '%Y-%m') AS month, COUNT(*) AS playCount, COALESCE(SUM(played_seconds), 0) AS totalSeconds FROM play_history WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND played_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{months} MONTH) GROUP BY month ORDER BY month

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(played_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date, COUNT(*) AS count, COALESCE(SUM(played_seconds), 0) AS totalSeconds FROM play_history WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND played_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY date ORDER BY date
